description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named cov-build that runs on a weekly schedule, on push of tags matching v*.*.* or coverity*, and on pull requests to the master branch affecting specific paths. In a single windows-2019 job, set up the environment with PowerShell, install tools and libraries, cache and install Coverity scan tools, configure CMake, build with Coverity, and submit the results to Coverity Scan.
